# Canopy Guard
# Free Website Visibility + Security Audit Tool
# Built by Soulful Tech | Meraki is Love, LLC

> Canopy Guard is a free website audit tool that scans any domain in 15 seconds across 47 signals covering SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and security. It then cross-references visibility findings against security findings to surface gaps that no other tool catches independently.

## What It Checks
- SEO: 14 signals including crawlability, H1 structure, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, viewport, lang attribute, image alt text, word count, response time, internal linking, sitemap
- AEO: 10 signals including FAQ schema, Organization schema, LocalBusiness schema, Breadcrumb schema, JSON-LD validation, schema type diversity, Q&A content density
- GEO: 8 signals including chunking efficiency, citation precision, llms.txt status, content depth, lists, tables, heading-to-content ratio
- Security: 15 signals including TLS, HSTS, HTTPS redirect, 6 security headers, cookie flags, AI crawl policy, exposed endpoints, vulnerability indicators

## Cross-Reference Intelligence
The unique differentiator. Maps visibility data against security data to find gaps:
- AI Crawl Gap: permissive robots.txt + no llms.txt = AI scrapers ingesting without citation guidance
- Exposed Endpoints: internal API routes in frontend JavaScript visible to RAG parsers
- Content Provenance Risk: no attribution markup allowing AI training set ingestion without linking back

## Scoring Philosophy
100 is hard to achieve by design. The scoring methodology is published openly. Every signal and every weight is documented so anyone can verify how their score was calculated.

## Competitive Position
No other tool, free or paid, runs a unified audit across SEO, AEO, GEO, and security in a single scan and cross-references the findings. Enterprise teams use SEMrush ($130/month) plus Mozilla Observatory plus manual robots.txt reviews to approximate what Canopy Guard does in 15 seconds for free.
